4211	ALTER_TSCONFIG_REPLACE_DICT_FOR_TOKEN,
4212	ALTER_TSCONFIG_DROP_MAPPING,
4213} AlterTSConfigType;
4214
4215typedef struct AlterTSConfigurationStmt
4216{
4217	NodeTag		type;
4218	AlterTSConfigType kind;		/* ALTER_TSCONFIG_ADD_MAPPING, etc */
4219	List	   *cfgname;		/* qualified name (list of String) */
4220
4221	/*
4222	 * dicts will be non-NIL if ADD/ALTER MAPPING was specified. If dicts is
4223	 * NIL, but tokentype isn't, DROP MAPPING was specified.
4224	 */
4225	List	   *tokentype;		/* list of String */
4226	List	   *dicts;			/* list of list of String */
4227	bool		override;		/* if true - remove old variant */
4228	bool		replace;		/* if true - replace dictionary by another */
4229	bool		missing_ok;		/* for DROP - skip error if missing? */
4230} AlterTSConfigurationStmt;
4231
4232typedef struct PublicationTable
4233{
4234	NodeTag		type;
4235	RangeVar   *relation;		/* relation to be published */
4236	Node	   *whereClause;	/* qualifications */
4237	List	   *columns;		/* List of columns in a publication table */
4238} PublicationTable;
4239
4240/*
4241 * Publication object type
4242 */
4243typedef enum PublicationObjSpecType
4244{
4245	PUBLICATIONOBJ_TABLE,		/* A table */
4246	PUBLICATIONOBJ_TABLES_IN_SCHEMA,	/* All tables in schema */
4247	PUBLICATIONOBJ_TABLES_IN_CUR_SCHEMA,	/* All tables in first element of
4248											 * search_path */
4249	PUBLICATIONOBJ_CONTINUATION,	/* Continuation of previous type */
4250} PublicationObjSpecType;
4251
4252typedef struct PublicationObjSpec
4253{
4254	NodeTag		type;
4255	PublicationObjSpecType pubobjtype;	/* type of this publication object */
4256	char	   *name;
4257	PublicationTable *pubtable;
4258	ParseLoc	location;		/* token location, or -1 if unknown */
4259} PublicationObjSpec;
4260
4261typedef struct CreatePublicationStmt
4262{
4263	NodeTag		type;
4264	char	   *pubname;		/* Name of the publication */
4265	List	   *options;		/* List of DefElem nodes */
4266	List	   *pubobjects;		/* Optional list of publication objects */
4267	bool		for_all_tables; /* Special publication for all tables in db */
4268} CreatePublicationStmt;
4269
4270typedef enum AlterPublicationAction
4271{
4272	AP_AddObjects,				/* add objects to publication */
4273	AP_DropObjects,				/* remove objects from publication */
4274	AP_SetObjects,				/* set list of objects */
4275} AlterPublicationAction;
4276
4277typedef struct AlterPublicationStmt
4278{
4279	NodeTag		type;
4280	char	   *pubname;		/* Name of the publication */
4281
4282	/* parameters used for ALTER PUBLICATION ... WITH */
4283	List	   *options;		/* List of DefElem nodes */
4284
4285	/*
4286	 * Parameters used for ALTER PUBLICATION ... ADD/DROP/SET publication
4287	 * objects.
4288	 */
4289	List	   *pubobjects;		/* Optional list of publication objects */
4290	bool		for_all_tables; /* Special publication for all tables in db */
4291	AlterPublicationAction action;	/* What action to perform with the given
4292									 * objects */
4293} AlterPublicationStmt;
4294
4295typedef struct CreateSubscriptionStmt
4296{
4297	NodeTag		type;
4298	char	   *subname;		/* Name of the subscription */
4299	char	   *conninfo;		/* Connection string to publisher */
4300	List	   *publication;	/* One or more publication to subscribe to */
4301	List	   *options;		/* List of DefElem nodes */
4302} CreateSubscriptionStmt;
4303
4304typedef enum AlterSubscriptionType
4305{
4306	ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_OPTIONS,
4307	ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_CONNECTION,
4308	ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_SET_PUBLICATION,
4309	ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_ADD_PUBLICATION,
4310	ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_DROP_PUBLICATION,
4311	ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_REFRESH,
4312	ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_ENABLED,
4313	ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_SKIP,
4314} AlterSubscriptionType;
4315
4316typedef struct AlterSubscriptionStmt
4317{
4318	NodeTag		type;
4319	AlterSubscriptionType kind; /* ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_OPTIONS, etc */
4320	char	   *subname;		/* Name of the subscription */
4321	char	   *conninfo;		/* Connection string to publisher */
4322	List	   *publication;	/* One or more publication to subscribe to */
4323	List	   *options;		/* List of DefElem nodes */
4324} AlterSubscriptionStmt;
4325
4326typedef struct DropSubscriptionStmt
4327{
4328	NodeTag		type;
4329	char	   *subname;		/* Name of the subscription */
4330	bool		missing_ok;		/* Skip error if missing? */
4331	DropBehavior behavior;		/* RESTRICT or CASCADE behavior */
4332} DropSubscriptionStmt;
4333
4334#endif							/* PARSENODES_H */
